prompt: Help me plan my next four weeks as founder of Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Energy-aware focus surfaces
nodes.details: Plan the month as experienced cadence: deep craft mornings, people conversations, recovery blocks.

nodes.label: Calm operating ritual
nodes.details: Weekly personal OS: one review surface that reduces chaos rather than adding dashboards.

nodes.label: Protect trust-design time
nodes.details: If shipping consumes all hours, join/trust UX regresses — schedule non-negotiable design blocks.

nodes.label: Member-feeling check-ins
nodes.details: Each week includes tasting the product as a new member would — empty states, join friction.

nodes.label: Single focus mode UI
nodes.details: Personal board shows one primary experience goal per week, not a wall of tasks.
